Organize your space efficiently with this versatile M MZG 5-tier metal wire shelving unit. Perfect for basements, warehouses, kitchens, garages, and laundry rooms, this storage rack offers ample space for all your belongings. The durable chrome finish adds a sleek look while providing long-lasting use. Each shelf is adjustable in 1-inch increments, allowing for customized storage solutions without the need for any tools. Equipped with adjustable leveling feet, this unit ensures stability on various surfaces, making it a practical and adaptable storage solution for any area of your home or workspace. Metal wire shelving unit 5 tiers Dimensions: 15.8 inches deep x 45.3 inches wide x 70.4 inches high Chrome finish Suitable for basement, warehouse, kitchen, garage, and laundry Shelves are adjustable in 1-inch increments No tools required for assembly Features adjustable leveling feet info: We aim to show you accurate product information. knowledge.content:
Product details

If you're looking for the perfect combination of comfort, functionality, and modern design, the LINSY HOME V-Shaped Pull-Out Sofa Bed is your ultimate choice! More than just a sectional couch, it easily transforms into a comfortable sofa bed within seconds, offering an ideal solution for overnight guests, movie nights, or daily lounging. With spacious built-in storage compartments and a user-friendly modular design, it’s made to fit seamlessly into your ever-changing lifestyle.Designed for modern living, our versatile sectional sleeper sofa features ultra-soft plush corduroy fabric that’s breathable, pet-friendly, and resistant to wrinkles and pilling. The luxurious high-density sponge and cotton filling, combined with a sturdy solid wood and metal frame, ensure long-lasting comfort and durability. The upgraded 7-inch wide armrests are equipped with built-in USB and Type-C charging ports, convenient side storage pockets, and cup holders on both sides, adding maximum functionality to your space.Whether you need a cozy spot to lounge, an extra bed for guests, or organized hidden storage, the LINSY HOME Pull-Out Couch Bed offers unmatched flexibility and everyday convenience.Easy to assemble without tools and highly adaptable to any room layout, it’s the perfect centerpiece for your living room, guest room, or apartment. Elevate your home with this all-in-one solution for modern comfort!

Product Specifications:

Item Name: Linsy Home 81" Plush Corduroy Sleeper Sofa Bed with Storage Chaise, Pull Out Couch Bed with USB, Cup Holder, Side Pocket Additional Features: Pull-Out Couch Bed, Built-in Storage, Plush Corduroy Fabric, USB & Type-C Charging Ports, Cup Holders, Easy Assembly, Pet-Friendly, Breathable, Anti-Wrinkle, Durable Recommended Use: Pull Out Couch, Sofa Couch Bed, Sectional Sofa, Sleeper Sofa, Couch with Storage, U-Shaped Couch Recommended Room: Living Room, Bedroom, Guest Room, Office, Apartment, Home Theater Dimensions:81"L x 81"W x 34"H Seating Capacity: 6–7 Material: 100% Polyester Plush Corduroy Frame Material: Solid Wood + Metal Style: Modern Available Colors: Green, Dark Grey, Beige, Navy Blue

Package Content:

1 x Pull Out 2 in 1 Sectional Sleeper Sofa 1 x Accessory Kit 1 x Instruction Manual

Important Notes:

This pull out couch bed is delivered in 4 boxes, which may arrive at different times. Please verify the product dimensions to ensure it fits your space before purchase. Cushions are vacuum-packed and require 48–72 hours to fully expand after unpacking. For any inquiries, feel free to contact us. We will respond within 24 hours. 🔹 [Ultimate Versatility - Easily Switch Between Sofa and Bed]: Effortlessly pull out the seat to transform your sectioanal sofa into a comfortable sleeper sofa bed within seconds, perfect for daily lounging, movie nights, or hosting overnight guests.

⏱️ [ Enhanced Convenience - USB Charging, Cup Holders & Hidden Storage]: Equipped with USB and Type-C ports, dual cup holders, wide 7" armrests with storage pockets, plus spacious hidden compartments under the chaise or seat, bringing smart functionality to your fingertips.

🏡 [Spacious & Stylish - Fits Perfectly into Any Room]: Measuring 81"L x 55"W x 34"H, this Pull Out 2 in 1 Sleeper Sofa comfortably seats 3–4 people, making it a perfect fit for living rooms, guest rooms, small apartments, or home offices.

🌟 [ Supreme Touch - Ultra-Soft Plush Corduroy for Everyday Comfort]:Crafted with premium plush corduroy that’s exceptionally soft to the touch and breathable, ensuring a cozy, inviting feel every time you sit, lounge, or sleep.

🌱 [Effortless Maintenance - Stain-Resistant & Easy-to-Clean Fabric]: Designed for real life, the pull out sofa's durable, wrinkle-resistant material easily handles spills, pet hair, and everyday messes with simple vacuuming or spot cleaning, keeping it fresh and beautiful with minimal effort.

⏱️ [Easy Assembly & Hassle-Free Transport] - Shipped in four manageable boxes, this sleeper sofa couch is easy to move and can be assembled by one person in just 30 minutes. No stress, just comfort waiting for you to enjoy.

Product details

Meet the Shark CarpetXpert with Stainstriker Technology, 2-in-1 upright deep carpet cleaner and built-in StainStriker spot & stain eliminator, combines Shark's powerful suction & PowerSpray high pressure spray to deliver unbeatable carpet cleaning and the best tough stain elimination. Two unique chemicals mix and activate on contact in the built-in tool to deliver 20X more stain-striking power ^ and instant odor removal^ on carpets, area rugs, upholstery and more. Includes a 3.5 inch reversible bristle stain tool, integrated crevice tool, 12oz Shark CarpetXpert Deep Clean Pro formula and 16oz Shark StainStriker OXY Multiplier formula. UNBEATABLE DEEP CARPET CLEANING: Shark's powerful suction and deep-cleaning innovation delivers unbeatable deep carpet cleaning along with the best tough stain elimination results HANDHELD SPOT & STAIN ELIMINATOR: The first and only deep carpet cleaners with a built-in spot and stain remover designed to extend and clean stairs, carpet, upholstery and other isolated stains STAINSTRIKER TECHNOLOGY: Two unique chemicals mix and activate on contact in the built-in handheld tool unleashing the power of OXY for 20X more stain-striking power leaving behind a fresh scent^ CARPETXPERT TECHNOLOGY: Combines the action of a high-speed brushroll, PowerSpray high-pressure spray and powerful Shark suction to deliver unbeatable dirt and grime removal REMOVES ODORS: Instantly and permanently removes odors, including pet urine and smoke^ ULTRA-FAST DRY TIMES: Shark's CarpetXpert technology and powerful suction deliver ultra-fast dry times using dry-only mode without over soaking your carpets WHATS INCLUDED: 3.5 inch reversible bristle stain tool, integrated crevice tool, 12oz Shark CarpetXpert Deep Clean Pro formula and 16oz Shark StainStriker OXY Multiplier formula. *Shark CarpetXpert models vs. consumer carpet cleaners based on ASTM F2828 using included cleaning solution as of May 15, 2024. Based on TM110, vs. extractor market, using included stain cleaner and best-performing accessory. *^vs. Shark Deep Clean Pro Formula. ^When using Shark cleaning solution. info: We aim to show you accurate product information. Product details

Ayieyill Christmas Village House Decorations, Light Up Christmas Decorations Indoor, Tabletop Christmas Decor, Christmas Village Houses Resin LED Create a cozy, nostalgic holiday display with this Ayieyill light-up Christmas village house. Whether placed on a mantel, bookshelf, or tabletop centerpiece, its warm LED glow adds inviting charm to your christmas decorations indoor. Designed to complement both modern and traditional christmas village setups, this resin-crafted house features classic detailing and softly lit windows that evoke the spirit of the season. Its compact size makes it perfect for small spaces, and the gentle light brings warmth without overwhelming your décor. A lovely addition to any tabletop christmas decor arrangement or a thoughtful gift for anyone who treasures timeless christmas village houses.

‌FESTIVE GREEN CHRISTMAS HOUSE: This charming green village house features icy glitter accents, snowy scalloped eaves, and red heart-shaped decorations above the door and windows—adding playful elegance to your christmas decorations indoor. WARM HOLIDAY GLOW: The house features a built-in LED light that emits a soft, warm glow—casting a peaceful ambiance across your light up christmas decorations and filling any room with cozy holiday spirit. HANDCRAFTED RESIN DETAIL: Made from high-quality resin, this piece is carefully hand-painted with shimmering finishes and snowy textures—ideal for enhancing your christmas village houses collection. SMALL SIZE, BIG IMPACT: Measuring approx. 3.14" x 4.33", this piece fits beautifully into tabletop christmas decor setups on mantels, shelves, or entry tables without crowding your display. GIFTABLE HOLIDAY ACCENT: Whether used alone or as part of a full christmas village, this green light-up house adds timeless seasonal joy and makes a thoughtful addition to your christmas decorations. info: We aim to show you accurate product information.
